name: EL LOCO 😍💃💯🔥 268sh 25/30mm F3 Compound - Maximum Impact, Breathtaking Performance!
description: Vivid have done it again! Another stunning compound lasting 2 and a half minutes and producing some great effect. The start of this almost looks like an eye. The clever choice of firing pattern and effect give the impression of a halo of red ghost horse tails with bursts of blue and gold brocade in the center.  Red mines to red and gold brocade crown follow, in fact there are just too many great colours and effects to list. You’re just going to have to watch the video in awe!

name: Venom - Vivid Pyrotechnics
description: Venom was produces for us on the back of the success of our Lesli cake Angry Heidi. When we couldn’t get any more Angry Heidi’s (apparently all her sheep came home so she wasn’t angry anymore) we aproached several importers and asked if they could produce a 100 shot, 20mm, 2 minute cake which we could retail for under £50. Many said it couldn’t be done, but the guys at Vivid set about asking their factories to produce some demos, but not only did we get Venom a mid noise cake full of colour and different effects lasting 120 seconds / 2 minutes we also got ANTI-VENOM a low noise version of the same cake!

name: Vivid Pyrotechnics Velocity Compound 224 Shots From Snowdonia Fireworks
description:
VOTED BEST COMPOUND 2023

Velocity is a 4 cake, 224 shot compound from Vivid Pyrotechnics firing a mix of colour, effects and noise at a great pace and with each cake already linked, you only have to light one fuse! Starting with rapid machine gun shots of gold coconuts with red, blue, yellow and purple with glittering stars adding another dimension. Further rapid firing gold kamuro with red, blue and green stars before an erruption of more gold with blinking stars of red, green, orange. Gold brocades follow with an intensity that fills the sky with gold and colour. Just when you think it’s all over, rows of coloured stars to crackling flowers errupt before a finale of whislte, ti-flower and crackling. Velocity is an apt name for this fast paced firework.

name: Anti-Venom Vivid Pyrotechnics
description: A fantastic 100 shot garden firework full of colour and great effects such as flying fish, spit horsetails, spit white strobes, comets and crackling comets lasting aproximately 2 minutes and all for under £50! This would make a great addition to not only a low noise firework party but any display. Check out the slightly noiser version VENOM if you fancy spicing it up a bit. I mean, 1 of each would give you 200 shots and 4 minutes of action!

name: Terminal Velocity
description: Oh wow. A great speed and pace to the firing of this mixed shape piece. 164 shots in just under a minute is always going to be impressive. Terminal Velocity launches with a fan of blue tails to gold wave to red with blue and continues sweeping across the sky with red and blue wave, purple tails to orange and purple wave, yellow tails to orange and blue wave and red tails to red wave. A rapid fanned volley of the same completes this section of the firework. Next up with have straight firing bursts of purple tails to multi-coloured bursts and silver palms with gold flitter, another section of fanned effects before a rapid onslought of silver titanium bursts to finish.

name: PEKING OPERA 3 HF-129-2223 HF-114-2224 20/25/30mm
description:
Get ready to be amazed by the Peking Opera 3 X, a 243-shot compound firework featuring 20/25/30mm tubes. This 100-second display begins with a fanned sequence of red glitter mines and dazzling blue and green bursts, swiftly followed by vibrant dahlias in colours like red, lime, purple, and blue.

The show intensifies with massive blue star mines and electric blue dahlias, creating a stunning visual. The grand finale features spiraling gold tourbillion tails, vibrant bursts, and golden crackles, ensuring an unforgettable finish for any event.

name: Bloodshot Compound Cake
description: Straight firing red tails to gold brocade glitter and red blink, green tails to gold crown which change to a unique white tip, a new and unusual effect followed by a Z-firing double sweep of blue tails to gold brocade and blue and a fanned volley of gold and red are followed by more of the new unique gold to silver effect with lots of deep red stars fired in a V formation. BloodShot continues with more gold, blue, red and crackling effects before the most amazing double W firing volleys of huge turbillion tails to ti-radium salutes and red blink stars.

name: DELIRIOUS
description: We all know that Vivid produce some of the most impressive fireworks available to the public and Delirious is no exception. This mixed shape compound / sib starts with big bursts of gold brocade crown alternating with green glitter and purple stars. A W-shaped volley of gold tails to gold kamuro with silver strobe tips follows. Pulse firing gold brocades to red plum, more W firing and then a fanned volley crackling brocade palms. Delirious then steps up the pace with a Z-firing fan of brocades and glittering stars before a stunning V-firing formation of gold crackling come tails with huge bursts of green and blue dahlia to red ghost/plum in between. A finale fanned volley finishes this cake to perfection.

name: SCATTERBRAIN Barrage💥💯💀 21sh F3 #ASYLUM #fireworks #vividpyrotechnics
description: Scatter Brain by Vivid Pyrotechnics is a powerful 21-shot F2 garden firework featuring golden and silver dragonflies, multicolour peonies, and the latest Fire Flies scatter effect. With 30mm tubes and 500g of NEC, this vibrant firework packs professional-grade performance into a compact size. Perfect for Bonfire Night, Diwali, weddings, or any celebration, it’s one of the best value small fireworks on the market.

name: Fire Flash
description: These new FireFlash rockets from Vivid launch with a fantastic woosh accoompanied by a crackling tail before bursting with a ti-core to white blinking stars. There’s 8 in this pack and just one pack won’t be enough of these great rockets.

name: Jeopardy
description:
Get ready to be blown away by Vivid’s latest single ignition masterpiece! With a thrilling pace that’ll leave you on the edge of your seat, this firework boasts some of the most vibrant colours you’ve ever seen. And that’s not even the best part – the effects are simply jaw-dropping! all packed into a single ignition with 57 heart-pumping shots. Perfect for those seeking a multi-angle experience that will leave you breathless and wanting more. Vivid fireworks has truly outdone themselves with this phenomenal wonder, so gather your friends and family and get ready for an unforgettable display!
If you like this, then you would want to see its two bigger brothers – 64 shot Jeopardy Barrage and 83 shot Delirious Barrage Firework, which have both won awards in their categories – a must-watch!

Approx time:  55 secs
Firing pattern:  Mixed
Firing shots:  57
Hazard class:  1.3g
Height:  30 Meters
Noise:  9/10
Powder weight:  410g
Safety distance:  15 Meters
Tube size: 20/25mm
Additional information
Weight
2.9 kg
Dime

name: VSR2 Rockets - Vivid Pyrotechnics
description:
Prepare for a stunning display with our firework rockets by the VSR3 Rocket – a magnificent set of triple pack 3” Ball Rockets by Vivid Pyrotechnics. Each rocket boasts a stunning, glittering tail and a unique, breathtaking finish that will leave you gobsmacked. Brace yourself for the three big, loud effects produced by these rockets, the First –  a vibrant red strobe with a chrysanthemum pistil and special glittery tail, Second – an electrifying green strobe with a chrysanthemum pistil and a special glittery tail and, last but not least, a remarkable silver to red wave with a green pistil and special glittery tail. Get ready to be dazzled!
If you’re looking for slightly bigger rockets, don’t miss the VSR4′ Ball Rocket pack. It’s sure to add an extra level of excitement to your fireworks display.

name: Gold Fever
description:
For those who adore deep, shimmering gold effects, the Gold Fever Barrage is your perfect choice. This firework starts with an impressive array of 30mm titanium bursts, showcasing long-lasting, deep gold willows that set a dramatic tone. As the show progresses, enjoy 7-shot fans that fill the sky twice, creating a stunning spectacle with added gold strobe and gold plum effects.

The tails and mines further enhance the display, offering an extraordinary show of brilliance and depth. Watch the video to see why this firework is a must-have for your collection.

name: Sky Candy XL
description: Ready to light up your next special occasion with a bang? Look no further than The NEW Sky Candy XL, now offers MORE powder, colour, Ti-Breaks, IMPROVED pace, and rhythm, the spectacular 100 Shot and 30mm compound cake from VIVID Pyrotechnics. With its dazzling display of colour and explosive energy, it’s sure to leave both you and your guests astounded.

name: WTF 512 Shots Compound Cake
description: Prepare to witness the explosive awesomeness that is What the F! fireworks. This incredible pack consists of eight interlinked 64-shot cakes that will unleash a barrage of vivid colours and deafening sounds in under three minutes. With a total of 512 jaw-dropping shots including brocades, glittering stars, coloured peonies, and so much more, this firework is sure to leave you and your audience speechless. Known for their top-notch quality, Vivid has truly outdone themselves with WTF. Supplies are incredibly limited, so make sure to act fast and secure your chance to experience the ultimate firework show also when buying Vivid Pyrotechnics fireworks. After seeing it in action, you’ll never forget its name – guaranteed!

name: Zeigelstein
description: Zeigelstein from Vivid Pyrotechnics @fireworkcrazy

name: Breakout Spinning Fountain
description:
Description
Breakout Spinning Fountain by Vivid Pyrotechnics is a beautifully crafted 65-second low-noise F2 fountain. It’s designed for garden displays where vibrant visuals matter more than sound. This piece combines a series of creative and visually rich effects. Starting with a dynamic spinning driver that creates a BREAKOUT-style motion, followed by a steady silver spray and elegant dirty gold flutter that captures everyone’s attention.

What truly sets the Breakout Fountain apart is its tri-fountain finale, which erupts unexpectedly into three separate fountain jets. Adding a fun surprise element that elevates your show. With 80g of NEC, this fountain offers a safe yet captivating experience, making it ideal for family events, Diwali, Bonfire Night, or small wedding receptions.

Crafted by Vivid Pyrotechnics, the UK’s most awarded firework brand of 2025, this fountain features their latest visual innovations. They continue to prove that small-scale fireworks can still offer big visual payoffs. It’s a crowd-pleaser with elegant effects and an unforgettable performance that’s perfect for children and noise-sensitive celebrations.

While this spinning fountain reaches a height of 10 feet. And fills the garden with excellent effects. Why not check out our other FOUNTAINS

name: CATACLYSM
description: A superb new compound single ignition from Vivid. Boasting 404 shots and lasting 210 seconds (3 and a half minutes in old money). This bonkers firework does not let up. Starting with red stars with silver and red glitter, purple and green stars with green glitter, V firing effects, then W firing effects, in fact so many effects and shapes if I list them all here it would take you so long to read you might as well have just watched the video!

name: STRAIGHT UP CRAZY - [NEW 2025] Vivid Pyrotechnics #fireworks
description: Tails of red, green and blue stars ride to brocade crown bursts with matching coloured tips. A pulse firing section of red tails to brocade to red blink and green tails to brocade to green blink and blue tail to brocade and blue with matching coloured mines below preceed a Z firing W fan of beautiful gold glittering crowns. A volley of red, blue and gold mines fire upwards to the same above with an amazing hang time complete this SIB.

name: Vibe - VIV49I-002
description: OMG! I’ve never seen such amazing effects crammed in to a 40g rocket! This pack of 6 rockets is a joy to behold. Not only do the rockets have the great launch Whooosh they also have some funky tails including silver glitter, red glitter and crackling.

name: Wizard Wands
description: Wizard wands from Bright Star fireworks

name: 2 Huge Stunning 4" Pro Effect Rockets
description: Get ready for a double dose of fiery fun with the 2 Huge Stunning 4″ Pro Effect Rockets in this Twin Pack ! Featuring Brocade crowns and Nishiki Kamuros effects, these rockets will light up the sky with an explosive display that will make your jaw drop. When buying Vivid fireworks rockets you get a added bonus of being a value pack, this is a must-have for any firework enthusiast looking to impress their friends and family. The mesmerising effects will leave your audience on their feet, watching in awe from afar. Don’t miss out on this unforgettable experience!
